lines.english: For how long did the writer give up smoking?
lines.raw: For how long did the writer give up smoking? | 作者戒烟戒了多久？

lines.english: After reading an article entitled 'Cigarette Smoking and Your Health' I lit a cigarette to calm my nerves.
lines.chinese: 读了一篇题为《吸烟与健康》的文章后，我点燃了一支香烟来镇定情绪。
lines.raw: After reading an article entitled 'Cigarette Smoking and Your Health' I lit a cigarette to calm my nerves. | 读了一篇题为《吸烟与健康》的文章后，我点燃了一支香烟来镇定情绪。

lines.english: I smoked with concentration and pleasure as I was sure that this would be my last cigarette.
lines.chinese: 我聚精会神、津津有味地抽着，因为我确信这是我的最后一支香烟了。
lines.raw: I smoked with concentration and pleasure as I was sure that this would be my last cigarette. | 我聚精会神、津津有味地抽着，因为我确信这是我的最后一支香烟了。

lines.english: For a whole week I did not smoke at all and during this time my wife suffered terribly.
lines.chinese: 整整一个星期我根本没吸烟，在此期间我妻子可遭了大罪了。
lines.raw: For a whole week I did not smoke at all and during this time my wife suffered terribly. | 整整一个星期我根本没吸烟，在此期间我妻子可遭了大罪了。

lines.english: I had all the usual symptoms of someone giving up smoking: a bad temper and an enormous appetite.
lines.chinese: 我具备了戒烟者的所有常见症状：脾气暴躁，胃口大开。
lines.raw: I had all the usual symptoms of someone giving up smoking: a bad temper and an enormous appetite. | 我具备了戒烟者的所有常见症状：脾气暴躁，胃口大开。

lines.english: My friends kept on offering me cigarettes and cigars.
lines.chinese: 我的朋友们不断地给我递香烟和雪茄。
lines.raw: My friends kept on offering me cigarettes and cigars. | 我的朋友们不断地给我递香烟和雪茄。

lines.english: They made no effort to hide their amusement whenever I produced a packet of sweets from my pocket.
lines.chinese: 每当我从口袋里掏出一包糖果时，他们都毫不掩饰地取笑我。
lines.raw: They made no effort to hide their amusement whenever I produced a packet of sweets from my pocket. | 每当我从口袋里掏出一包糖果时，他们都毫不掩饰地取笑我。

lines.english: After seven days of this I went to a party.
lines.chinese: 这样过了7天，我参加了一个聚会。
lines.raw: After seven days of this I went to a party. | 这样过了7天，我参加了一个聚会。

lines.english: Everybody around me was smoking and I felt extremely uncomfortable.
lines.chinese: 我周围的人都在吸烟，我感到非常不舒服。
lines.raw: Everybody around me was smoking and I felt extremely uncomfortable. | 我周围的人都在吸烟，我感到非常不舒服。

lines.english: When my old friend Brian urged me to accept a cigarette, it was more than I could bear.
lines.chinese: 当我的老朋友布赖恩极力劝我抽一支烟时，我再也忍不住了。
lines.raw: When my old friend Brian urged me to accept a cigarette, it was more than I could bear. | 当我的老朋友布赖恩极力劝我抽一支烟时，我再也忍不住了。

lines.english: I took one guiltily, lit it and smoked with satisfaction.
lines.chinese: 我内疚地拿了一支，点上，心满意足地抽了起来。
lines.raw: I took one guiltily, lit it and smoked with satisfaction. | 我内疚地拿了一支，点上，心满意足地抽了起来。

lines.english: My wife was delighted that things had returned to normal once more.
lines.chinese: 我妻子很高兴一切又恢复了正常。
lines.raw: My wife was delighted that things had returned to normal once more. | 我妻子很高兴一切又恢复了正常。

lines.english: Anyway, as Brian pointed out, it is the easiest thing in the world to give up smoking.
lines.chinese: 不过，正如布赖恩指出的，戒烟是世界上最容易的事情。
lines.raw: Anyway, as Brian pointed out, it is the easiest thing in the world to give up smoking. | 不过，正如布赖恩指出的，戒烟是世界上最容易的事情。

lines.english: He himself has done it lots of times!
lines.chinese: 他自己就戒过好多次了！
lines.raw: He himself has done it lots of times! | 他自己就戒过好多次了！
